text: The potholes on Main Street are getting ridiculous. My car suspension is completely ruined because the city hasn't fixed them in months! #civicissue #fail
We haven't had running water in our neighborhood for three days straight. The municipal corporation is ignoring all our calls. Please help!
Streetlights are out again in Sector 4. It's pitch black at night and feels very unsafe to walk home from the bus stop.
Garbage has been piling up at the corner of 5th Avenue for weeks. It stinks and is attracting rats. When will the city clean this up?
Public transport is completely broken today. Trains are delayed by hours with no communication from the authorities.
Just witnessed a terrifying armed robbery at the convenience store down the street. The guys had guns and took all the cash. Cops just arrived.
My neighbor's house was broken into last night while they were sleeping. Everyone in the area please lock your doors and stay vigilant!
There was a huge gang fight near the downtown area. Heard gunshots and screaming. So scary, avoid the area right now.
My car window was smashed and my laptop was stolen from the parking lot. Crime in this city is getting out of control.
Just saw someone get assaulted at the subway station. They punched him in the face and ran away. I hope he is okay.
I can't take this anymore. Everything hurts and I don't see the point in waking up tomorrow. It's just too heavy to bear.
I feel so empty and worthless. I wish I could just disappear and stop being a burden to everyone around me.
I've been thinking a lot about ending it all. The pain never stops and I have no one to talk to. I'm completely alone in this dark hole.
Sometimes I just want to hurt myself to feel something other than this numb depression. It's suffocating.
Goodbye everyone. I'm sorry I wasn't strong enough to fight this. I just want peace.
Why do people think it's okay to send me death threats online just because of my opinion? I'm terrified to even open my DMs anymore.
They leaked my private photos and address on a forum. I'm receiving hundreds of hateful messages and calls. I don't feel safe.
Stop telling me to kill myself in the comments! It's not a joke, it's sick and cruel harassment.
My ex won't stop stalking my profiles and making fake accounts to harass me and my friends. It's ruining my mental health.
This coordinated cyberbullying campaign against me is exhausting. Everyday I wake up to new vile comments attacking my appearance.
MASSIVE FIRE at the chemical plant on the east side! Huge explosions and toxic smoke everywhere. Evacuate immediately!
Just felt a massive earthquake in downtown. Buildings are shaking and power lines are down. Everyone get to safety!
Terrible multi-car pileup on Highway 101. Looks like several severe injuries. Ambulances are struggling to get through traffic.
The river has breached the banks and floodwaters are rushing into our street. We are trapped on the second floor, send rescue boats!
Tornado warning! The sirens are going off and I can see the funnel cloud forming near the outskirts. Taking cover in the basement now.
